hero.headline:
Your Complete Outdoor One-Stop
Solution
hero.subheadline: From pools to pavers to irrigation, Greenscapes Landcare has been the trusted name for Phoenix-area property managers and homeowners since 2003. One call handles everything -- so you can focus on what matters.
checkmarks: One company for every outdoor need

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Landscape, Pool & Irrigation<br class="hidden md:block">All Under One Roof
services.subtitle: Stop juggling multiple contractors. Greenscapes handles your entire outdoor property -- from landscape design to pool construction to smart irrigation -- with one trusted team.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Installation
cards.description: Complete landscape construction including grading, colorscaping, artificial turf, lighting, and desert-adapted plantings. Designed for Arizona's climate, built to last.

cards.title: Commercial Property Maintenance
cards.description: Full-service turf, shrub, and tree care for apartment complexes and multi-housing communities. Fertilization, weed control, and pest management included.

cards.title: Pool Design & Construction
cards.description: Custom swimming pool design, installation, repair, and refinishing through our sister company Pool Hub, LLC. From concept to first splash.

cards.title: Smart Irrigation Systems
cards.description: Weathermatic Premier Partner delivering 38% average water savings. Smart controllers, system design, installation, and repair for commercial and residential properties.

cards.title: Hardscape Construction
cards.description: Custom pavers, BBQ islands, block walls, stucco, fire features, and mailbox construction. Crafted hardscapes that transform your outdoor living space.

cards.title: Tree Service
cards.description: Professional tree removal, trimming, and fertilization through sister company Turning Leaf, LLC. Safe, efficient, and thorough work on every job.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Beautiful Property

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your property. We'll visit in person, evaluate your landscape, irrigation, and pool needs, and provide a detailed, no-pressure proposal within 48 hours.

steps.title: We Bring the Full Team
steps.description: Our licensed, bonded crews handle everything -- landscaping, irrigation upgrades, hardscape, pool work, and tree service. One point of contact, zero coordination headaches.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Outdoor Space
steps.description: Your property looks stunning, your water bills drop, and your tenants or family love the results. We stay on as your long-term maintenance partner whenever you need us.

about.label: Why Property Managers Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned, Full-Service, and Focused on Your Success
about.description: Since 2003, the Greenscapes family has served the Phoenix metro with a simple promise: do everything right under one roof. From apartment complexes to residential backyards, our ALCA-certified team delivers landscape, irrigation, pool, hardscape, and tree services with the accountability only a family-run company can offer. We treat every property like our own.

features.title: Licensed, Bonded & Insured
features.description: Full licensing and insurance on every project. BBB A+ rated since 2011, so you can trust the team on your property.

features.title: One Company, Every Service
features.description: Landscape, irrigation, pools, hardscape, and trees -- all handled in-house or through our sister companies. No more juggling vendors.

features.title: 38% Average Water Savings
features.description: As a Weathermatic Premier Partner, our smart irrigation systems cut water waste dramatically -- saving you money and conserving Arizona's most precious resource.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed written proposal. No hidden fees, no change-order games -- just honest pricing from a family-owned company.

guarantee.headline: Our "Done Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service we provide, we come back and make it right at no additional cost. We've built our reputation over 23 years by standing behind every job -- from a weekly mow to a full pool build. Your satisfaction isn't negotiable.

faqs.question: Do you handle both commercial and residential properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in apartment complexes and multi-housing communities, but we also serve residential homeowners across Maricopa County. Same quality, same accountability, regardless of property size.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Phoenix metropolitan area including Glendale, Scottsdale, Tempe, Mesa, Chandler, and surrounding communities throughout Maricopa County.

faqs.question: Can you really handle landscaping, pools, and irrigation?
faqs.answer: Yes -- that's our biggest advantage. Greenscapes Landcare handles landscape design and maintenance in-house, while our sister companies Pool Hub, LLC and Turning Leaf, LLC cover pool services and tree work. One call, one point of contact, every outdoor need covered.

faqs.question: How much can smart irrigation save me?
faqs.answer: As a Weathermatic Premier Partner, our clients see an average 38% reduction in water usage. For commercial properties with large turf areas, that translates to thousands of dollars saved annually on water bills.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. Greenscapes Landcare is fully licensed, bonded, and insured. We're BBB Accredited with an A+ rating since 2011 and hold ALCA certification. Your property and your peace of mind are fully protected.

testimonials.name: Long-Term PM
testimonials.text: We have been using Greenscapes at our communities for over 12 years and are happy with their landscaping services. I highly recommend them for any property manager looking for reliable, consistent landscape care.

testimonials.name: Residential Client
testimonials.text: They were always on time and kept in regular contact throughout the whole process, and everyone was very professional. Our new landscape looks incredible and was finished ahead of schedule.

testimonials.name: Property Owner
testimonials.text: From start to finish, they were incredibly skilled, professional, and truly masters of their craft. The workmanship is outstanding and the attention to detail really shows in the final result.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform Your
Outdoor Space?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure property assessment within 48 hours. One call covers landscaping, pools, irrigation, hardscape, and tree service -- everything your property needs.

footer.description: Family-owned landscape, pool & irrigation company. Serving Maricopa County since 2003.
